ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "trip_start_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip started */,
  "trip_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "trip_miles" REAL /* Distance of the trip in miles */,
  "pickup_community_area" INTEGER /* Community area where the trip started */,
  "dropoff_community_area" INTEGER /* Community area where the trip ended */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxi company */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "trip_fare" REAL /* Total fare for the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the trip (e.g., cash, card, etc.) */,
  "tip_amount" REAL /* Tip amount given by the passenger */,
  "trip_status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., completed, cancelled, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_dropoff_community_area FOREIGN KEY ("dropoff_community_area") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_pickup_community_area FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_community_area") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number issued to the company */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles in the company's fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the driver works for */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the vehicle belongs to */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV, etc.) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum passenger capacity of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area */,
  "community_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the community area */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the community area is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community area */,
  "area_square_miles" REAL /* Total area of the community area in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., start, end, intermediate) */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the log location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the log location */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community area where the log entry was recorded */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the log location */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of travel at the log location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the feedback is about */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user providing feedback */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback from the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_conditions" (
  "traffic_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic condition entry */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community area where the traffic condition was recorded */,
  "traffic_level" TEXT /* Level of traffic congestion (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the traffic condition entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_conditions_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition entry */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community area where the weather condition was recorded */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Current weather condition (e.g., sunny, rainy, etc.) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Current temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather condition entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_closures" (
  "road_closure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road closure entry */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community area where the road closure is located */,
  "road_name" TEXT /* Name of the road that is closed */,
  "closure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the road closure (e.g., construction, accident, etc.) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the road closure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the road closure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_closure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_closures_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., oil change, tire rotation, etc.) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_safety" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety entry */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver involved in the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., accident, complaint, etc.) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_safety_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)
